events.title: Reform proposal introduced
events.body: A pension reform proposal is introduced, reviving debate over the individually funded system.

events.title: Large marches in Santiago
events.body: Tens of thousands march in the capital calling for higher pensions and structural change.

events.title: Congress opens hearings
events.body: Lawmakers begin hearings on the reform, drawing renewed street demonstrations.

events.title: Momentum eases
events.body: Unions signal a shift toward negotiation as turnout at protests declines.
